title: Autonomous Obstacle-Avoidance Rover
description: Six-wheel rocker-bogie rover navigating rough terrain using forward-facing LiDAR and sonar array. Performs A* path replanning on obstacle detection; operated via nRF24L01 wireless link from a remote base station.
objective: Traverse 30° inclines; detect obstacles ≥ 50 mm at 1 m; navigate a 10×10 m outdoor area without manual intervention.
constraints: ≤ 5 kg; 12 V LiPo; nRF24 link ≤ 100 m; ≤ £150 BOM.
supporting_fact_titles: Ultrasonic Proximity Sensor — ToF Distance Measurement
DC Motor Speed Control via PWM
design_element_titles: L298N Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver Module
DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control

element_usage_notes.Rocker-Bogie Rough-Terrain Drive System: 6-wheel passive suspension; 3D-printed PETG links; 80 mm diameter wheels.
element_usage_notes.nRF24L01 2.4 GHz RF Transceiver Link: Auto-ACK; 250 kbps; 100 m open-field range; pipe 0 = telemetry, pipe 1 = cmd.
element_usage_notes.TFMini-S Single-Point LiDAR Distance Sen: Forward-facing; UART 115200 baud; primary obstacle detection at 0.3–3 m; 100 Hz update rate.
element_usage_notes.HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Obstacle-Distance Sen: Left and right flanking sensors at 45° offset; 20 Hz polling; threshold 40 cm triggers A* replan.
element_usage_notes.L298N Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver Module: Controls left and right motor banks (3 motors each in parallel); 12 V logic; PWM at 1 kHz.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Mega 2560 MCU Platform: Runs A* planner, sensor polling, nRF24 comms, and motor PWM in 50 ms main loop.

element_interactions.description: LiDAR UART stream parsed in interrupt; distance forwarded to A* obstacle map. Values < 300 mm halt the rover immediately.
Two sensors polled alternately at 20 Hz via GPIO trigger/echo. Side obstacles < 40 cm flag lateral replan.

element_interactions.data: command frame (8 bytes: joystick_x, joystick_y, speed_limit, mode_flags)
element_interactions.description: Remote commands received at up to 50 Hz on pipe 1. Rover telemetry (heading, speed, obstacle flags) returned on pipe 0.

element_interactions.to: L298N Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver Module
element_interactions.description: A* planner outputs differential drive velocity commands; mapped to L298N IN1/IN2/ENA/ENB PWM signals at 1 kHz.

element_interactions.from: L298N Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver Module
element_interactions.to: DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control
element_interactions.description: Left and right motor banks (3 motors each) driven from dual H-bridge outputs. Parallel wiring limits per-channel current to 2 A.
